query:
SELECT 
  a.id,
  a.demandId,
  a.workerId,
  a.scheduledStart,
  a.scheduledEnd,
  a.status,
  d.date,
  c.name AS clientName
FROM assignments a
LEFT JOIN demands d ON a.demandId = d.id
LEFT JOIN clients c ON d.clientId = c.id
WHERE a.workerId = (SELECT id FROM workers WHERE name = '宇軒' LIMIT 1)
  AND d.date = '2026-02-20'
ORDER BY a.scheduledStart;
